name: Yoda
bannerMiniatureIdeas: Yoda's gimer stick planted in a mossy Dagobah stump, with a tiny woven Ewok totem hanging from the branch
A carved Endor tree trunk bearing the Jedi Order symbol, ringed with glowing swamp fireflies from Dagobah
A small bronze bust of Yoda mounted on a base of woven Bright Tree Village vine rope and Ewok spears
vehicleSuggestions: X-wing Starfighter (Luke's Dagobah training ship — ties Yoda to his most famous apprentice)
Ewok Hang Glider (Battle of Endor aerial assault alongside the tribe)
Rebel Assault Shuttle (deployment to the forest moon — Yoda directing the alliance)

factionTrait.name: Tactician Champion
factionTrait.text: A tactician moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: Living Force
uniqueTraits.text: After one of his actions, Yoda may place a status effect token of his choice in an adjacent empty hex. When a model enters a hex with a token, move it onto them after they end their movement.

ultimate.name: Hold the Line
ultimate.text: Remove any number of Ewoks from the battlefield and place them on objective hexes within range. Ewoks on objective hexes cannot make advance actions or be moved by enemy skills.

plotSkills.name: Levitate
plotSkills.text: Move one objective hex within range 1 hex onto an empty non-objective hex. Models on the objective hex move with it.

plotSkills.name: Trust the Force
plotSkills.text: Place a status effect token of your choice in an empty hex within range. When a model enters a hex with a token, move it onto them after they end their movement.

clashSkills.name: Force Push
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move each friendly and enemy model in hexes adjacent to the target up to 1 hex away from the target.

clashSkills.name: Force Wave
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move all models in the target's hex up to 2 hexes.

traits.name: Tribe of Endor
traits.text: When the Ewoks make a recruit action, you may recruit one, two, or three Ewoks to the hex.

plotSkills.name: Vanish Into Forest
plotSkills.text: Remove any number of Ewoks from the battlefield. Then take a recruit action for each Ewok this skill removed from the battlefield.

clashSkills.name: Spear Jab
clashSkills.text: If the hit roll total equals the target's dodge exactly, this skill has +3 {damage_die}.
